series_metadata.series_description: The Employer Policy Account Refunds are documentation supporting the issuing of employer policy account refunds. All Employer Refunds are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS) and the Accounts Receivable I drive.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Employer refunds of $25,000 or higher are scanned into the Employer Policy file. The daily refund documentation which includes all employer refunds are scanned into the I drive Accounts Receivable repository. Once paper records have been scanned and image verified, securely shred. ; Electronic: Retain the daily refund documentation on the I drive Accounts Receivable repository for two (2) years, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved – then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
